gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一场因错发语音而起的隔空爱恋，温柔又奇妙。
gems.whyWatchEn: A mistaken voicemail sparks a long-distance romance that feels both tender and delightfully unexpected.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫、带点奇幻巧思的观众，以及怀念书信时代温暖交流的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted romance with a twist of serendipity, and viewers who miss the warmth of analog communication.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 玩具老友与数字新宠的碰撞，充满时代感的童真冒险。
gems.whyWatchEn: A playful yet poignant clash between classic toys and digital gadgets, capturing the evolving heart of childhood.
gems.audience: 《玩具总动员》系列老粉，以及想和孩子探讨科技与陪伴话题的家庭。
gems.audienceEn: Longtime Toy Story fans, and families looking for a fun conversation starter about technology and companionship.
